prerequisites.value: You must have a close family member or other loved one slain by a specific challenging foe or that foe’s minions, or have the Raiders or Vengeance background.

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a +1 bonus on saving throws, attack rolls, and weapon damage rolls against your chosen foe and known minions of that foe. Goal: Thwart your chosen foe. Completion Benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on all saving throws. This bonus stacks with this feat’s bonus against your foe and its minions, should they survive.
